channel.title: Challenges We Created on Ricardo Ribeiro
channel.description: Recent content in Challenges We Created on Ricardo Ribeiro

item.title: Emergency Notes - Double XOR Cryptography
item.description: A cryptography challenge focused on the XOR operation and its reversibility, requiring players to test key combinations to decrypt a double-XOR-encrypted backup.

item.title: Handsome Peter - Steganography Challenge
item.description: A multi-technique steganography challenge covering EXIF metadata, file appending, LSB, DCT, colour palette manipulation, and audio steganography.

item.title: Little Juice Challenge - Boot2Root
item.description: A Boot2Root Docker challenge involving port scanning, Git repository exposure, lateral movement via PostgreSQL, and privilege escalation through a misconfigured cronjob.

item.title: Nicolay Magic Numbers - Network Knocker & Brute Force
item.description: A multi-stage challenge involving port knocking with a Fibonacci sequence, WAF bypass via rate limiting, and a nested zip bomb requiring scripted extraction.

item.title: Otillianni Math - Prime Number Indexing
item.description: A data obfuscation challenge where a flag is hidden inside 10,000 random characters by placing each flag character at prime number indices.

item.title: Reverse Power - File Carving & Magic Bytes
item.description: A forensics challenge involving corrupted file signatures, hex editing, EXIF password extraction, and password-protected ZIP archives.

item.title: The Disk Dump - FAT12 Forensics & XOR Decryption
item.description: A forensic imaging challenge involving FAT12 filesystem analysis, recovery of deleted files, a decoy rabbit hole, and XOR-based flag decryption.

item.title: The Moodle Breach - Multi-Vector Forensics
item.description: A miscellaneous challenge combining HTML source analysis, XOR decryption, EXIF metadata extraction, LSB steganography, Base64 decoding, and visual forensics to recover 6 flags.

item.title: The True Owner - LFI, Base64 & Cookie Tampering
item.description: A web challenge chaining OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: information disclosure via robots.txt, Local File Inclusion, Base64-encoded credentials, and cookie tampering for privilege escalation.
